title: koyamacalia bulbiferoides
intro: Koyamacalia bulbiferoides is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family. It is known for its bulbiferous habit, where underground stems produce small bulbs. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in its root and bulb, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the root and bulb of Koyamacalia bulbiferoides are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other health issues, offering potential health benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation.
